title: poc-chart deployment template
description: Canaried microservice (Deployment + HPA + Flagger Canary). GUI schema that renders the Devtron deployment template.

global.title: Global
global.description: Values shared across the chart. Set per-environment by the platform.

imageRegistry.title: Image Registry
imageRegistry.description: Container registry prefix, e.g. us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/<project>/shared-artifacts. Used only when image.useBuilt is true.

appName.title: App Name
appName.description: Name of the Deployment / Service / HPA / Canary. This is the Flagger target.

image.title: Image
image.description: Workload image. useBuilt toggles between upstream podinfo (false) and the CI-built image (true).

useBuilt.title: Use Built Image
useBuilt.description: false = upstream podinfo by repository:tag (Iteration A). true = CI-built <registry>/<name>@<digest> (Iteration B).

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Image repository (Iteration A path). Devtron injects this at deploy time.

tag.title: Tag
tag.description: Image tag (Iteration A path). Devtron injects this at deploy time.

name.title: Name
name.description: Image name appended to global.imageRegistry (Iteration B path).

digest.title: Digest
digest.description: Image digest, baked at package time (Iteration B path).

port.title: Port
port.description: Port the application (and /metrics) is served on.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Minimum and maximum RAM and CPU available to the application.

requests.title: Requests
requests.description: What the container is guaranteed to get.

limits.title: Limits
limits.description: The maximum a container can reach.

autoscaling.title: Autoscaling (HPA)
autoscaling.description: The HPA owns the replica count so Flux and Flagger never fight over it.

targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.title: Target CPU %
targetCPUUtilizationPercentage.description: Target average CPU utilization to scale on.

canary.title: Canary (Flagger)
canary.description: Flagger Canary + MetricTemplates. Gated so the chart also installs on clusters without Flagger.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: false = plain Deployment; true = Flagger-driven canary.

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.description: Existing Gateway API Gateway the canary attaches to (cluster infra).

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.description: Canary stepping and gate thresholds (driven by Flagger, not Devtron).

maxWeight.title: Max Weight
maxWeight.description: Traffic % at which canary is promoted to primary.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Prometheus source for the canary gates (cluster infra).
